name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_tsrc_uvw_pcas_caplentrted_pivotted
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_tsrc' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_pcas_caplentrted_pivotted' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP) AS latest_observed_ts,
  CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  '' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_tsrc`.`uvw_pcas_caplentrted_pivotted`
